rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Never default to bold for headers; use Light or Medium for elegance.
Apply tight letter spacing to headings.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, generous spacing, large touch targets for operations.

specifics.touch_targets: min-h-[64px] min-w-[64px] for all inventory counting interactions.
specifics.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle inner border, no heavy drop shadows in dark mode.
specifics.navigation: Bottom tab bar for mobile PWA layout, fixed with safe-area-inset.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4A017] text-[#0A0A12] hover:bg-[#E5B83A] font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.inventory_tap: w-full h-16 bg-[#1A1A2E] border border-[#2B2B4A] rounded-lg text-lg flex items-center justify-center data-[state=active]:bg-[#D4A017] data-[state=active]:text-[#0A0A12]

inputs.pin_button: h-20 w-20 rounded-full bg-[#1A1A2E] border border-[#2B2B4A] text-2xl flex items-center justify-center active:bg-[#D4A017] active:text-[#0A0A12] mx-auto

components.charts: Use Recharts with custom tooltips. Colors: #D4A017 for sales/usage, #D62828 for variance.

motion.interactions: Fast, responsive micro-interactions (active:scale-95) for counting buttons.
motion.transitions: Simple fade-in for page transitions. Avoid heavy 3D or parallax as this is a high-speed operational tool.

icons_assets.usage: Use Phosphor Icons for a premium, clean look that scales well.

image_urls.description: Gold 'OPS AI' logo with chef hat and analytics arrow on dark background
Cozy restaurant interior featuring elegant golden chandeliers and a dimly lit ambiance
Abstract luxury dark restaurant interior texture

instructions_to_main_agent: PWA SETUP: Ensure manifest.json and service worker are configured for mobile-first installation.
FONTS: Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts. Apply globally in Tailwind.
LAYOUT: Build primarily for mobile screens (max-w-md mx-auto or full width on mobile devices). Include a bottom navigation bar for core views: Dashboard, Bar, Kitchen, Insights.

INVENTORY UI: The 'Bar Mode' MUST use massive touch targets (h-16 or h-20) for the 5 bottle levels (Full, 75%, 50%, 25%, Empty) arrayed as a visual grid or segmented control. Do not use native <select> for this.
THEMING: Force dark mode default. Set document background to '#0A0A12'.
TESTING: Every interactive element (login PIN pad, inventory tap buttons, nav links) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="btn-bottle-75"').
AI INSIGHTS: Present the Gemini AI 3 actionable recommendations in visually distinct 'Glassmorphism' cards to emphasize the 'AI' value add.
COMPONENT USAGE: Use Shadcn UI for forms, dialogs, and selects. Customize border radius (rounded-xl) and apply the dark charcoal/gold color scheme.
